case_title: LARAMAR URBAN SPECIALTY PARTNERS VS. SANGEUN PARK et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LARAMAR URBAN SPECIALTY PARTNERS
